revision.text:
{{Portal|Architecture}} {{Commonscat}} {{cat main|Architectural element}}
'''[[Architectural element]]s''' are the unique details and component parts that, together, form the [[architectural style]] of houses, buildings and structures.
This terminology '''does ''not '' include''': * Terms for buildings as a whole (e.g. [[church (building)|church]], [[mansion]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Buildings and structures]] and [[List of building types]] * Names for parts of buildings defined by their function (e.g. [[kitchen]], [[nave]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Rooms]] * The names of styles of buildings or architectural movements (e.g. [[Gothic architecture|Gothic]], [[Bauhaus]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Architectural styles]] * Building materials or construction methods (e.g. [[thatch]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Building materials]]
Collection of articles that describe the '''''physical parts''''' of [[building]]s:
;See also: * [[Architectural sculpture]] * [[Glossary of architecture]]
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Architecture|Elements]] [[Category:Architectural design]] [[Category:Building engineering|Elements, Architectural]] [[Category:Components]] }} [[Category:Categories with 18 members]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Portal|Architecture}} {{Commonscat}} {{cat main|Architectural element}} '''[[Architectural element]]s''' are the unique details and component parts that, together, form the [[architectural style]] of houses, buildings and structures. This terminology '''does ''not '' include''': * Terms for buildings as a whole (e.g. [[church (building)|church]], [[mansion]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Buildings and structures]] and [[List of building types]] * Names for parts of buildings defined by their function (e.g. [[kitchen]], [[nave]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Rooms]] * The names of styles of buildings or architectural movements (e.g. [[Gothic architecture|Gothic]], [[:en:Bauhaus|Bauhaus]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Architectural styles]] * Building materials or construction methods (e.g. [[thatch]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Building materials]] Collection of articles that describe the '''''physical parts''''' of [[building]]s: ;See also: * [[Architectural sculpture]] * [[Glossary of architecture]]
{{CatAutoTOC}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Architecture|Elements]] [[Category:Architectural design]] [[Category:Building engineering|Elements, Architectural]] revision.text: {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Commonscat}} {{cat main|Architectural element}} '''[[Architectural element]]s''' are the unique details and component parts that, together, form the [[architectural style]] of houses, buildings and structures. This terminology '''does ''not '' include''': * Terms for buildings as a whole (e.g. [[:en:Church (building)|church]], [[mansion]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Buildings and structures]] and [[List of building types]] * Names for parts of buildings defined by their function (e.g. [[kitchen]], [[nave]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Rooms]] * The names of styles of buildings or architectural movements (e.g. [[Gothic architecture|Gothic]], [[:en:Bauhaus|Bauhaus]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Architectural styles]] * Building materials or construction methods (e.g. [[thatch]]) :''refer to'': revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Commonscat}} {{cat main|Architectural element}} '''[[:en:Architectural element|Architectural element]]s''' are the unique details and component parts that, together, form the [[:en:Shinto architecture|Shinto architecture]] of houses, buildings and structures. This terminology '''does ''not '' include''': * Terms for buildings as a whole (e.g. [[:en:Church (building)|church]], [[mansion]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Buildings and structures]] and [[List of building types]] * Names for parts of buildings defined by their function (e.g. [[kitchen]], [[nave]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Rooms]] * The names of styles of buildings or architectural movements (e.g. [[:en:Gothic architecture|Gothic]], [[:en:Bauhaus|Bauhaus]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Architectural styles]] * Building materials or construction methods (e.g. [[thatch]]) :''refer to'': [[:Category:Building materials]] Collection of articles that describe the '''''physical parts''''' of [[:en:Building|Building]]s: ;See also: * [[:en:Architectural sculpture|Architectural sculpture]] *
